name: dg-snn-v2-model
description: Dual-gated spiking neural network offline model prototype.

scripts.eval: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js eval
scripts.export: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js export
scripts.export:2d-challenge: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js export:2d-challenge
scripts.trace: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js trace
scripts.explain: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js explain
scripts.audit: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit
scripts.audit:2d: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:2d
scripts.audit:2d-challenge: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:2d-challenge
scripts.audit:2d-complex: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:2d-complex
scripts.audit:arbitration: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:arbitration
scripts.audit:arbitration:matrix: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:arbitration:matrix
scripts.audit:transfer: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:transfer
scripts.audit:transfer:cell: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:transfer:cell
scripts.audit:transfer:matrix: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:transfer:matrix
scripts.audit:transfer:matrix:multi: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:transfer:matrix:multi
scripts.audit:rewardonly:collapse: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:rewardonly:collapse
scripts.audit:rewardonly:challenge-collapse: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js audit:rewardonly:challenge-collapse
